message:
🐛 Fix HTTPRoute overwrite when deploy_wva is true (#36)

The "Deploy HTTPRoute" step in the reusable workflow applies the raw
httproute.yaml from the guide directory after install.sh has already
deployed a correctly-templated HTTPRoute. This overwrites the templated
names (e.g. infra-workload-autoscaling-inference-gateway) with the
defaults from the static file (e.g. infra-workload-autoscaler-inference-gateway),
causing a gateway→pool name mismatch and HTTP 404 responses.

Skip the step when deploy_wva is true since install.sh already handles
HTTPRoute deployment with proper RELEASE_NAME_POSTFIX templating.

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -569,7 +569,7 @@ jobs:
           ${{ inputs.custom_deploy_script }}
 
       - name: Deploy HTTPRoute
-        if: inputs.httproute_file != '' && inputs.custom_deploy_script == ''
+        if: inputs.httproute_file != '' && inputs.custom_deploy_script == '' && !inputs.deploy_wva
         run: |
           HTTPROUTE="${GUIDE_PATH}/${{ inputs.httproute_file }}"
           if [ -f "$HTTPROUTE" ]; then
